videos.headline: Georgia gets back to winning ways vs. Auburn
videos.description: Georgia gets a couple touchdowns from Trevor Etienne and Carson Beck throws two touchdowns as Georgia beats Auburn 31-13 at home.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia gets back to winning ways vs. Auburn) 2024/10/05 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Trevor Etienne powers Georgia ahead with a TD
videos.description: Trevor Etienne gives Georgia the early lead as he scores from 2-yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trevor Etienne powers Georgia ahead with a TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Confusion for intended receiver somehow ends up as a Georgia TD
videos.description: Carson Beck throws a pass that receiver Dillon Bell lets pass and it ends up in the hands of Dominic Lovett who scores a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Confusion for intended receiver somehow ends up as a Georgia TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia blocks a FG to end the first half
videos.description: Georgia's Dan Jackson gets his hand up to block the long field goal attempt to end the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia blocks a FG to end the first half) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jarquez Hunter breaks a tackle, scores 38-yard Auburn TD
videos.description: Auburn pulls within four as Jarquez Hunter breaks a tackle and scores a 38-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jarquez Hunter breaks a tackle, scores 38-yard Auburn TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trevor Etienne scores after lengthy review
videos.description: Trevor Etienne scores his second touchdown of the game after a lengthy review.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trevor Etienne scores after lengthy review) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck rips one to Dillon Bell for a Bulldogs TD
videos.description: Georgia takes a 28-10 lead as Carson Beck finds Dillon Bell for a 3-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck rips one to Dillon Bell for a Bulldogs TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
